MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Laura Martinez
Michael Keck, Esq. for Petitioner: Dong Wang, present as Guardian at litem for: Erica Wang, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $8,750.00
A net balance of $26,250.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, Sunset Branch, 21st Ave. (cross street, Irving St.), San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
